title: fix: getRkey returns undefined due to missing backward compatibility
body:
NapCat's `get_rkey` API returns the rkey array directly as the response `data`, but the code expected it wrapped as `{ rkeys: [...] }`, causing `result.rkeys` to return `undefined`.

The fix adds dynamic detection to handle both the new NapCat array format and the older `{ rkeys: [...] }` wrapped format for backward compatibility.

## Changes

- **`packages/onebot/src/api/bot.ts`**: Updated `getRkey` response type to a union type supporting both the array-direct format (NapCat) and the legacy `{ rkeys: Array<...> }` wrapper format
- **`packages/core/src/adapter/onebot/core/core.ts`**: Use `Array.isArray()` to dynamically detect and handle both response formats

```typescript
// Response type now accepts both formats
response: Array<{ type: 'private' | 'group', rkey: string, created_at: number, ttl: number }>
        | { rkeys: Array<{ type: 'private' | 'group', rkey: string, created_at: number, ttl: number }> }

// Implementation dynamically handles both
return Array.isArray(result) ? result : result.rkeys
```

## Summary by Sourcery

处理旧版和新版 OneBot `get_rkey` 响应格式，防止出现未定义的 `rkey` 结果。

Bug 修复：
- 修复当 API 返回裸 `rkey` 数组而不是包装为 `{ rkeys: [...] }` 对象时，`getRkey` 返回 `undefined` 的问题。

增强：
- 扩展 OneBot `getRkey` 响应的类型定义，以同时支持数组形式和包装对象形式的 `rkey` 响应格式。

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Handle both legacy and new OneBot get_rkey response formats to prevent undefined rkey results.

Bug Fixes:
- Fix getRkey returning undefined when the API responds with a bare rkey array instead of a wrapped { rkeys: [...] } object.

Enhancements:
- Broaden the OneBot getRkey response typing to support both array and wrapped rkey response formats.

</details>

title: fix: 更新适配器平台、标准、协议和通信方式的类型定义，添加新选项
body:
## Summary by Sourcery

更新适配器类型定义，以支持更多平台、标准、协议和通信方式，并允许使用自定义标识符。

新功能：
- 新增适配器平台，包括 WeCom、DingTalk、Feishu、Slack 和 WhatsApp，以及已有的平台。
- 扩展适配器标准，新增 Milky 和 Satori，并允许所有适配器标准接受自定义字符串标识符。
- 扩展适配器协议，新增 Yogurt 实现，并允许适配器协议接受自定义字符串标识符。
- 新增对服务器发送事件（Server-Sent Events，SSE）作为适配器通信方式的支持，并允许通信类型接受自定义字符串标识符。

改进：
- 将 llonebot 适配器协议标识符重命名为 llbot，以提高一致性和可读性。

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Update adapter type definitions to support more platforms, standards, protocols, and communication methods while allowing custom identifiers.

New Features:
- Add new adapter platforms including WeCom, DingTalk, Feishu, Slack, and WhatsApp alongside existing ones.
- Extend adapter standards with Milky and Satori and allow all adapter standards to accept custom string identifiers.
- Extend adapter protocols with the Yogurt implementation and allow adapter protocols to accept custom string identifiers.
- Add Server-Sent Events (SSE) as a supported adapter communication method and allow communication types to accept custom string identifiers.

Enhancements:
- Rename the llonebot adapter protocol identifier to llbot for consistency and clarity.

</details>

title: Fix ffmpeg initialization priority order
body:
FFmpeg path resolution was checking the system `PATH` first, which caused `@karinjs/plugin-ffmpeg` and user config to be silently ignored whenever `ffmpeg` existed on the system.

## Changes

- **`packages/core/src/utils/system/ffmpeg.ts`**: Reorder initialization to match intended priority:
  - **Before (wrong):** system env → `@karinjs/plugin-ffmpeg` → user config
  - **After (correct):** `@karinjs/plugin-ffmpeg` → user config → system env (implicit fallback via default `'ffmpeg'`/`'ffprobe'`/`'ffplay'` values)

```typescript
// Before — system PATH check short-circuited the whole chain
const env = await exec('ffmpeg -version', { booleanResult: true })
if (!env) {
  try { /* @karinjs/plugin-ffmpeg */ }
  catch { /* user config */ }
}

// After — managed plugin takes priority; system PATH is implicit fallback
try {
  const plugin = await import('@karinjs/plugin-ffmpeg')
  // use plugin paths
} catch {
  // fall back to user config; default 'ffmpeg' string resolves via system PATH
}
```

title: feat: add `outside-top` labelPlacement support for Input (HeroUI v2.8.0)
body:
HeroUI v2.8.0 introduced a new `outside-top` value for `labelPlacement` on Input — unlike `outside` (which requires a placeholder to render the label outside), `outside-top` always positions the label above the input unconditionally.

## TypeScript interface changes
- `packages/core/src/types/components/input.ts` — `labelPlacement` extended to `'inside' | 'outside' | 'outside-left' | 'outside-top'`
- `packages/web/src/types/components/input.ts` — same

```ts
input.create('email', {
  labelPlacement: 'outside-top', // new: label always above, no placeholder required
  label: 'Email',
})
```

## Dependency bumps (`packages/web/package.json`)
| Package | Before | After |
|---|---|---|
| `@heroui/input` | `2.4.9` | `^2.4.23` |
| `@heroui/theme` | `2.4.9` | `^2.4.17` |
| `@heroui/system` | `^2.4.12` | `^2.4.18` |

`@heroui/input@2.4.23` is the first release implementing `outside-top` behavior. `@heroui/theme@2.4.17` is the last version compatible with Tailwind CSS v3 (v2.4.18+ requires v4); it includes the necessary `outside-top` CSS variants. Lock file updated accordingly.

title: fix: TypeError: data.find is not a function on first startup after npx karin init
body:
On first startup (or any re-init), `privates.json` and `groups.json` were silently corrupted — array configs became numeric-keyed objects — causing `.find()` to throw at runtime.

## Root causes

- **`createConfigFile` (cli-Internal/src/init.ts)**: When merging existing config files, the spread operator was applied unconditionally:
  ```js
  // Before — arrays become { "0": {...}, "1": {...} }
  const mergedData = { ...JSON.parse(defData), ...JSON.parse(targetData) }
  ```
  For array-typed configs (`privates.json`, `groups.json`), this destroys the array structure. Fix: skip the spread merge for array configs, preserving the user's file as-is. If the target is already corrupted (not an array), reset it to the default.

- **`initPrivates` / `initGroups` (core)**: `staticCache` was correctly guarded by the `isOld()` migration path, but `dynamicCache` was always reassigned via a raw `format(data)` call on the original (potentially non-array) data — bypassing migration entirely:
  ```js
  // Before
  staticCache = isOld(data) ? migrate(file, data) : format(data)
  dynamicCache = format(data)  // throws if data is not an array

  // After
  staticCache = isOld(data) ? migrate(file, data) : format(data)
  dynamicCache = staticCache
  ```
  The file-watcher callback already did this correctly; the init path did not.

title: fix: debug log level from .env not applied on startup
body:
`logger` is instantiated at module evaluation time — before `dotenv.config()` runs in `start()` — so `process.env.LOG_LEVEL` is unset at that point and the logger defaults to `'info'`. The only code path that synced `logger.level` post-load was the `initEnv` file-watcher callback, meaning the configured level only took effect after a manual file save triggered the watcher.

## Changes

- **`packages/core/src/index.ts`**: After `dotenv.config()` in `start()`, explicitly sync `logger.level` from the now-populated `process.env.LOG_LEVEL`:

```ts
dotenv.config({
  path: `${path.resolve(process.cwd(), process.env.EBV_FILE!)}`,
  override: true,
})
logger.level = (process.env.LOG_LEVEL || 'info') as LoggerLevel
```

This mirrors the identical assignment already present in the `initEnv` watch callback (`env.ts:90`) — just applied at startup rather than only on file change.

title: feat: handle bot_offline notice event in OneBot adapter
body:
The OneBot adapter was logging `[AdapterOneBot] 收到未知事件` whenever it received a `bot_offline` notice (e.g., account forcibly logged out). This adds full first-class support for the event across the type system, event pipeline, and adapter.

## Changes

**`packages/onebot`**
- `NoticeType.BotOffline = 'bot_offline'` enum entry + `BotOfflineNoticeEvent` interface added to `OneBotNoticeEvent` union

**`packages/core` — types**
- `BotOfflineType` content interface (`tag`, `message`)
- `'botOffline'` added to `NoticeEventSub` union; `BotOfflineOptions` type added (uses `Contact<'friend'>` / `Sender<'friend'>` — no group context exists for this event)
- `BotOfflineNotice` added to `FriendNoticeEventMap` as `'notice.botOffline'` and to the `Notice` union

**`packages/core` — event pipeline**
- `BotOfflineNotice` class extending `NoticeBase`
- `createBotOfflineNotice` factory routing through `friendNoticeHandler`
- `initTips` case: `Bot下线: <tag>`

**`packages/core` — adapter handler**
- `NoticeType.BotOffline` branch in `createNotice` using `bot.selfId` as contact/sender

Plugins can now subscribe to `'notice.botOffline'` events:

```ts
karin.notice('notice.botOffline', async (ctx) => {
  logger.warn(`Bot ${ctx.selfId} went offline: ${ctx.content.tag}`)
})
```

## Summary by Sourcery

在整个类型系统和事件管道中，为 OneBot 机器人离线通知事件添加一等支持。

新功能：
- 在 OneBot 适配器和核心事件/内容类型定义中引入 BotOffline 通知事件类型，使机器人离线事件得到显式建模。
- 新增 BotOfflineNotice 事件类和工厂方法，将机器人离线事件通过好友通知管道进行路由。
- 允许插件订阅和处理带有标准化内容（标签和消息）的 `notice.botOffline` 事件。

改进：
- 扩展 `initTips` 处理逻辑，为机器人离线事件提供可读性良好的人类提示信息。
- 更新 OneBot 通知事件联合类型和适配器通知创建逻辑，避免将 `bot_offline` 事件视为未知事件。

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Add first-class support for OneBot bot offline notice events across the type system and event pipeline.

New Features:
- Introduce a BotOffline notice event type in the OneBot adapter and core event/content typings so bot offline events are modeled explicitly.
- Add a BotOfflineNotice event class and factory that routes bot offline events through the friend notice pipeline.
- Allow plugins to subscribe to and handle 'notice.botOffline' events with standardized content (tag and message).

Enhancements:
- Extend initTips handling to provide a human-readable hint for bot offline events.
- Update the OneBot notice event union and adapter notice creation logic to avoid treating bot_offline events as unknown.

</details>

title: fix: close #615; 适配合并转发的外显参数
body:
## Summary by Sourcery

为合并转发消息提供外部展示选项支持，并更新核心依赖。

新功能：
- 为 Napcat 扩展中的 OneBot 转发消息 API 和 `NodeCustomMessage` 新增可选的外部展示字段（`news`、`prompt`、`summary`、`source`）。
- 允许 OneBotCore 的转发消息方法接受携带外部展示元数据的 `options` 对象。

增强：
- 在 `AdapterOneBot` 流程中传递转发消息的外部展示选项，以便在发送群组和私聊转发消息时一并包含这些信息。
- 将核心包切换为使用上游的 `jsonwebtoken` 库及其对应的类型定义，并调整开发依赖（devDependencies）。

构建：
- 更新核心包的 dependencies 和 devDependencies，加入 `jsonwebtoken` 及其 TypeScript 类型，并移除之前使用的带作用域的 `jsonwebtoken` 依赖。

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Support external display options for merged forward messages and update core dependencies.

New Features:
- Add optional external display fields (news, prompt, summary, source) to OneBot forward message APIs and NodeCustomMessage for Napcat extensions.
- Allow OneBotCore forward message methods to accept an options object carrying external display metadata.

Enhancements:
- Propagate forward message external display options through the AdapterOneBot flow so they are included when sending group and private forward messages.
- Switch core package to use the upstream jsonwebtoken library with corresponding type definitions and adjust devDependencies.

Build:
- Update core package dependencies and devDependencies to include jsonwebtoken and its TypeScript types and remove the previous scoped jsonwebtoken dependency.

</details>

## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **New Features**
  * Forward message functionality now supports optional customization fields including news, prompt, summary, and source for enhanced message composition.

* **Chores**
  * Updated core library dependencies and TypeScript build configuration.

[Karin][13:24:29.041][INFO] [ProcessManager] 子进程退出 | 退出码: 1 | 运行时间: 492053.4h
[Karin][13:24:29.041][INFO] [ProcessManager] 正在关闭子进程 | PID: 75789 | 运行时间: 492053.4h
[Karin][13:24:29.041][INFO] [ProcessManager] 发送终止信号 | PID: 75789 | 信号: SIGTERM
[Karin][13:24:29.041][INFO] [ProcessManager] 等待进程终止 | PID: 75789 | 超时: 200ms

[Karin][13:24:29.043][INFO] [ProcessManager] 父进程退出 | 总运行时间: 0.2s | 重启次数: 0
```

### 复现步骤

1. 使用Node.js版本>=25的环境
2. 尝试通过`pnpm app`启动项目
3. 出现上方的报错


### 预期行为

项目正常启动

### 实际行为

启动时报错，项目无法启动

### 操作系统

ArchLinux（内核：6.18.9-zen1-2-zen）

### Node.js 版本

25.6.1、pnpm版本10.28.2

### 项目版本

1.14.3

### 附加信息

**排查过程**

背景：`SlowBuffer`在`Node.js 24`中已[被移除](https://nodejs.org/en/blog/release/v24.0.0)
注意到报错来自于`@karinjs/jsonwebtoken@^1.1.1`，通过[查阅](https://www.npmjs.com/package/node-karin?activeTab=code)得知，此项目使用了`"jsonwebtoken": "^9.0.2"`
而`jsonwebtoken`有现存的关于`Node.js 24`[兼容性Issue](https://github.com/auth0/node-jsonwebtoken/issues/992)，并且此问题已在`9.0.3`版本中被解决，此版本已在两个月前被发布。

**可能的解决方案**：升级`@karinjs/jsonwebtoken`中的`jsonwebtoken`至`9.0.3`，由于我未能找到此包的代码仓库，故提出Issue

title: fix: 修复pokeUser参数错误的问题close #576
body:
## Summary by Sourcery

为 OneBot 修复并实现跨适配器的「戳一戳用户」功能，通过核心适配器和 OneBot API 将其接入 Lagrange 和 NapCat。

Bug 修复：
- 修正 `pokeUser` 适配器方法的函数签名以包含目标用户 ID，解决参数使用错误的问题。

增强内容：
- 在 OneBot 适配器中实现 `pokeUser` 逻辑，为 Lagrange 和 NapCat 提供群聊和好友两种场景的支持。
- 在 OneBot 核心层和 API 层中新增 Lagrange 好友和群组「戳一戳」操作及其对应的 API 定义。

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Fix and implement cross-adapter "poke user" support for OneBot, wiring it through the core adapter and OneBot APIs for Lagrange and NapCat.

Bug Fixes:
- Correct the pokeUser adapter method signature to include the target user ID, resolving incorrect parameter usage.

Enhancements:
- Implement pokeUser logic in the OneBot adapter with support for group and friend contexts on Lagrange and NapCat.
- Add Lagrange friend and group poke actions and API definitions in the OneBot core and API layer.

</details>

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **New Features**
  * Enhanced poke functionality allowing callers to specify a target recipient for friend and group pokes.
  * Implemented adapter-level poke handling so poke requests are executed across supported adapters.
  * Added new OneBot/Lagrange poke API actions and corresponding core methods to send friend and group poke requests.

<sub>✏️ Tip: You can customize this high-level summary in your review settings.</sub>
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

title: ci(workflow): 移除docker构建
body:
## Summary by Sourcery

通过将 Docker 镜像构建委托给外部仓库并更新核心开发依赖项来简化发布流程。

增强内容：
- 将 core 包中的开发依赖 `@karinjs/node-pty` 升级到最新兼容版本。

CI：
- 更新发布工作流，使其在外部的 `karin-docker` 仓库中触发 Docker 构建工作流，而不是使用当前仓库中的 Docker 工作流。
- 移除已废弃的 `.github/workflows/docker.yaml` 工作流文件，并在发布工作流中统一 npm registry URL 的引号格式。

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Streamline release process by delegating Docker image builds to an external repository and updating core development dependencies.

Enhancements:
- Bump @karinjs/node-pty devDependency in the core package to the latest compatible version.

CI:
- Update release workflow to dispatch the Docker build workflow in the external karin-docker repository instead of using the in-repo Docker workflow.
- Remove the obsolete .github/workflows/docker.yaml workflow file and normalize the npm registry URL quoting in the release workflow.

</details>

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Chores**
  * Removed Docker image build and publish workflow
  * Updated release workflow configuration with new repository parameter
  * Updated @karinjs/node-pty dependency to the latest patch version

<sub>✏️ Tip: You can customize this high-level summary in your review settings.</sub>

<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

chore(workflow): 移除docker.yaml工作流并更新发布流程
body:
移除原有的docker.yaml工作流文件，该文件负责构建amd64和arm64架构的
Docker镜像并推送到DockerHub和GHCR。

更新release.yml工作流，在发布流程中调用KarinJS/karin-docker仓库
的docker.yaml工作流来处理Docker镜像构建。

更新core包的@karinjs/node-pty依赖版本从1.1.0到1.1.3。

移除packages/docker目录下的Dockerfile、docker.sh和start.sh文件， 这些文件的维护已迁移到独立的karin-docker仓库

## Summary by Sourcery

在发布过程中将 Docker 镜像构建路由到外部的 karin-docker 仓库，并清理仓库内的 Docker 相关资源。

Enhancements:
- 从发布工作流中触发 karin-docker 仓库的 `docker.yaml` 工作流，以处理 Docker 镜像构建。
- 将 core 包中的开发依赖 `@karinjs/node-pty` 从 1.1.0 升级到 1.1.3。
- 移除已废弃的仓库内 Docker 工作流和现由外部 karin-docker 仓库维护的 Docker 相关文件。

Build:
- 调整发布工作流配置，包括 npm registry URL 的引号设置以及用于 Docker 构建的跨仓库工作流触发。

CI:
- 删除旧的 `.github/workflows/docker.yaml` 工作流，改用共享的 karin-docker 工作流。

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Route Docker image builds to the external karin-docker repository during release and clean up in-repo Docker assets.

Enhancements:
- Trigger the karin-docker repository's docker.yaml workflow from the release workflow to handle Docker image builds.
- Bump the @karinjs/node-pty dev dependency in the core package from 1.1.0 to 1.1.3.
- Remove the obsolete in-repo Docker workflow and Docker-related files now managed by the external karin-docker repository.

Build:
- Adjust release workflow configuration, including npm registry URL quoting and cross-repo workflow dispatch for Docker builds.

CI:
- Delete the legacy .github/workflows/docker.yaml workflow in favor of the shared karin-docker workflow.

</details>

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Chores**
  * Removed Docker container support and related CI/CD automation workflows
  * Updated development dependencies

<sub>✏️ Tip: You can customize this high-level summary in your review settings.</sub>

<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

title: fix: 修复部分接口action未被正确替换的问题
body:
## Summary by Sourcery

规范 OneBot 的 HTTP 和 WebSocket API 调用，在请求、错误报告和触发的事件中统一使用格式化后的动作名称。

Bug Fixes:
- 确保 WebSocket API 的请求、超时以及响应事件使用格式化后的动作名称，而不是原始动作字符串。
- 确保 HTTP API 端点、错误处理和 `SEND_API` 事件使用格式化后的动作名称来替代原始动作名称。

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Normalize OneBot HTTP and WebSocket API calls to use the formatted action name consistently in requests, error reporting, and emitted events.

Bug Fixes:
- Ensure WebSocket API requests, timeouts, and response events use the formatted action name instead of the raw action string.
- Ensure HTTP API endpoints, error handling, and SEND_API events use the formatted action name in place of the raw action.

</details>

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

title: Fix getPluginType returning inconsistent type for root plugins
body:
In development environments, `getPluginType()` returned `'npm'` for root plugins while `getPluginInfo()` returned `'git'`, causing web config retrieval to fail. Root plugins are processed as git-type plugins throughout the plugin loading system (`list.ts:312-315`), but `getPluginType()` incorrectly classified them as npm plugins. **Change:** ```typescript // packages/core/src/server/plugins/config.ts:347 - if (item === rootName) return 'npm' + if (item === rootName) return 'git' ``` This aligns `getPluginType()` with how root plugins are actually loaded and cached. > [!WARNING] > >
> Firewall rules blocked me from connecting to one or more addresses (expand for details) > > #### I tried to connect to the following addresses, but was blocked by firewall rules: > > - `registry.npmmirror.com` > - Triggering command: `/usr/local/bin/node node /home/REDACTED/.npm/_npx/c65dbefa27d408e0/node_modules/.bin/prebuild-install -r node --pkg_version=0.12.0 --pkg_name=node-pty-prebuilt-multiarch` (dns block) > > If you need me to access, download, or install something from one of these locations, you can either: > > - Configure [Actions setup steps](https://gh.io/copilot/actions-setup-steps) to set up my environment, which run before the firewall is enabled > - Add the appropriate URLs or hosts to the custom allowlist in this repository's [Copilot coding agent settings](https://github.com/KarinJS/Karin/settings/copilot/coding_agent) (admins only) > >
Original prompt > > ---- > > *This section details on the original issue you should resolve* > > Bug: 开发环境获取web配置文件失败 > ### 描述问题 > > 在开发环境获取web配置文件失败，同时getPluginType和getPluginInfo返回不一致，即getPluginType返回npm,getPluginInfo返回git, > > > 应当同步这两个部分返回类型， root应当返回git > > ### 复现步骤 > > 1. 第一步 > 2. 第二步 > 3. ... > > > ### 预期行为 > > 正确读取配置 > > ### 实际行为 > > 读取了错误的路径，web出现 > > > > ### 操作系统 > > windows 11 > > ### Node.js 版本 > > v24.12.0 > > ### 项目版本 > > 1.14.0 > > ### 附加信息 > > _No response_ > > 请你解决一下 > > ## Comments on the Issue (you are @copilot in this section) > > > @sj817 > @yusheng929 请你的copilot来修一下 > >

body:
## 来自 Sourcery 的摘要

添加机器人连接生命周期事件，并将其接入机器人注册和注销流程。

新特性：
- 为机器人连接生命周期引入 `BOT_CONNECT` 和 `BOT_DISCONNECT` 事件键。
- 在机器人注册时触发机器人连接事件。
- 在机器人注销时触发机器人断开连接事件。
- 通过 karin 核心模块中的共享事件发射器转发机器人连接和断开连接事件。

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Add bot connection lifecycle events and wire them into bot registration and unregistration flows.

New Features:
- Introduce BOT_CONNECT and BOT_DISCONNECT event keys for bot connection lifecycle.
- Emit a bot connection event when a bot is registered.
- Emit a bot disconnection event when a bot is unregistered.
- Forward bot connection and disconnection events through the shared event emitter in the karin core module.

</details>

title: fix: 增强ffmpeg鲁棒性
body:
## Sourcery 的总结

通过尝试加载 `@karinjs/plugin-ffmpeg` 插件来增强 FFmpeg 路径解析，若加载失败则回退到现有配置，并相应地更新依赖项和构建配置。

增强功能：
- 当 `@karinjs/plugin-ffmpeg` 插件可用时，优先使用其中提供的 FFmpeg、FFprobe 和 FFplay 路径，再使用本地配置

title: Fix: Prevent loading plugins with incompatible engine versions and add ignoreEngines option
body:
## Summary
Fixed the bug where plugins with incompatible engine versions would still execute their main entry file when installed via the web UI or API. Added option to force load plugins with version warnings.

## Recent Fix (Latest Commit)
Fixed issue where `ignoreEngines=true` was not working correctly - plugins with version mismatches were not being loaded even when `ignoreEngines` was explicitly set to `true`.

## Changes
- [x] Add version check in `pkgLoads` before loading main file
- [x] Add `karin.ignoreEngines` field to allow force loading with warnings
- [x] Update loading logic to check `ignoreEngines` flag
- [x] Output warning instead of error when force loading incompatible plugins
- [x] Fix logic to properly force load when `ignoreEngines=true`

## Implementation Details

### Version Check Logic
When a version mismatch is detected:
1. **`ignoreEngines` is `undefined` or `false`**: Plugin is completely blocked (returns early)
2. **`ignoreEngines` is `true`**: Sets `isCompatible = true` to force load the plugin with warning

This ensures only explicitly opted-in plugins (`ignoreEngines: true`) can bypass version checks.

## Example Usage

```json
{
  "name": "karin-plugin-example",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "karin": {
    "engines": {
      "karin": "^2.0.0"
    },
    "ignoreEngines": true
  }
}
```

## Behavior

### Scenario 1: Compatible version
- Plugin requires: `^1.0.0`, Current: `1.5.0`
- Result: Loads normally ✓

### Scenario 2: Incompatible WITHOUT ignoreEngines
- Plugin requires: `^2.0.0`, Current: `1.5.0`, `ignoreEngines: undefined`
- Result: Plugin blocked, main file NOT executed ✓

### Scenario 3: Incompatible WITH ignoreEngines=true
- Plugin requires: `^2.0.0`, Current: `1.5.0`, `ignoreEngines: true`
- Result: Plugin loads with warning, main file IS executed ✓

## Impact
- **Breaking Changes**: None
- **Backward Compatible**: ✅ Full
- **Fixes**: Force loading now works correctly with `ignoreEngines=true`

title: Fix: Support all semantic versioning formats in changelog parser
body:
## Problem

The `log` function in `packages/core/src/utils/fs/changelog.ts` was unable to extract changelog entries for semantic versions containing special regex characters, specifically:

- Pre-release identifiers: `1.0.0-alpha`, `1.2.3-beta.1`
- Build metadata: `1.0.0+20231017`
- Combined formats: `2.1.0-beta.3+build456`

### Root Cause

The version string was being used directly in a `RegExp` without escaping special characters. The `+` character in build metadata was interpreted as a regex quantifier (meaning "one or more"), causing the pattern to fail:

```typescript
// Before - fails for versions with + or other regex special chars
const regex = new RegExp(`## \\[${version}\\](.|\n)*?(?=## \\[|$)`, 'g')
```

For example, when searching for version `1.0.0+20231017`, the unescaped `+` creates an invalid regex pattern that matches zero occurrences of `7` instead of the literal string `1.0.0+20231017`.

## Solution

Added an `escapeRegex` utility function that properly escapes all regex special characters (`.*+?^${}()|[]\`) before using the version string in the RegExp:

```typescript
const escapeRegex = (str: string): string => {
  return str.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')
}

// Now escapes special characters before creating the regex
const escapedVersion = escapeRegex(version)
const regex = new RegExp(`## \\[${escapedVersion}\\](.|\n)*?(?=## \\[|$)`, 'g')
```

## Testing

Verified the fix handles all SemVer 2.0.0 formats:
- ✅ Basic versions (X.Y.Z): `1.0.0`
- ✅ Pre-release identifiers: `1.0.0-alpha`, `1.2.3-beta.1`, `2.0.0-0.3.7`
- ✅ Build metadata: `1.0.0+20231017`, `1.0.0+21AF26D3-117B344092BD`
- ✅ Combined formats: `2.1.0-beta.3+build456`, `1.0.0-beta+exp.sha.5114f85`

All 113 existing versions in CHANGELOG.md continue to parse correctly, ensuring full backward compatibility.

## Impact

- **Fully SemVer 2.0.0 compliant**: Now supports all valid semantic version formats
- **Backward compatible**: All existing functionality remains intact
- **No breaking changes**: Only adds support for previously unsupported formats
- **Minimal change**: 11 lines added, 1 line modified

title: Fix TypeError: data.find is not a function on first startup after npx karin init
body:
## Problem

When running `npx karin init` to initialize Karin for the first time, the application would crash with the error:

```
TypeError: data.find is not a function
```

This prevented users from successfully completing the initial setup, though restarting the terminal would make it work on subsequent attempts.

## Root Cause

The issue was in `packages/cli-Internal/src/init.ts` at line 360, where configuration files were being merged during initialization:

```javascript
const mergedData = { ...JSON.parse(defData), ...JSON.parse(targetData) }
```

When both `groups.json` and `privates.json` (which are arrays) were merged using the object spread operator, they were inadvertently converted from arrays into objects with numeric keys:

```javascript
// Before spreading: [{ key: "default" }, { key: "global" }]
// After spreading:  { 0: { key: "default" }, 1: { key: "global" } }
```

Since objects don't have the `.find()` method, subsequent code that tried to call `data.find(item => item.key === 'global')` would fail with the TypeError.

## Solution

### 1. Fixed Array Merging in init.ts

Added proper type detection to preserve array types during config file merging:

```javascript
const defParsed = JSON.parse(defData)
const targetParsed = JSON.parse(targetData)

// Preserve array types instead of converting to objects
let mergedData
if (Array.isArray(defParsed) && Array.isArray(targetParsed)) {
  mergedData = targetParsed
} else {
  mergedData = { ...defParsed, ...targetParsed }
}
```

### 2. Updated Default Configuration Files

Fixed `packages/core/default/config/privates.json` and `groups.json` to include:
- The missing `"global"` key entry (required by the format functions)
- The `"inherit": true` property on all entries (required by TypeScript interfaces)
- Removed deprecated properties (`memberEnable`, `memberDisable`)

### 3. Added Defensive Checks

Enhanced the `format()` functions in both `privates.ts` and `groups.ts` to gracefully handle edge cases:

```typescript
const format = (data: Privates): Record<string, PrivatesObjectValue> => {
  // Ensure data is an array before using .find()
  if (!Array.isArray(data)) {
    logger.warn('[privates.json] 配置文件格式错误，使用默认配置')
    data = defaultConfig.privates
  }
  // ... rest of function
}
```

## Testing

Verified the fix with a comprehensive test script that confirms:
- ✅ Config files are valid JSON arrays with all required keys
- ✅ Array spreading behavior is corrected
- ✅ init.ts properly handles array types
- ✅ Defensive checks prevent future issues with corrupted config data

This fix ensures that first-time initialization with `npx karin init` will complete successfully without errors.

title: fix: 修复setGgroupHighlights的命名为setGroupHighlights

## 问题描述

在 `AdapterOneBot` 类中，方法名 `setGgroupHighlights` 存在拼写错误，多了一个小写的 'g'，导致方法名不符合命名规范，且与基类 `AdapterBase` 和接口定义 `AdapterType` 不一致。

```

**修改后：**

async setGroupHighlights (_: string, messageId: string, create: boolean) {

title: fix: improve OneBot adapter compatibility for sub_type=normal in private messages
body:
- [x] Understand the issue: handle `sub_type === 'normal'` in private messages by treating it as friend message
- [x] Modify the code in `packages/core/src/adapter/onebot/create/message.ts` to handle the non-standard `sub_type === 'normal'` case
- [x] Fix TypeScript compilation error by adding `Normal = 'normal'` to `MessageSubType` enum
- [x] Update `MessagePrivateEvent` interface to include `MessageSubType.Normal` in the union type
- [x] Verify the fix works correctly

## Summary

**Fixed TypeScript compilation error** reported in the comments:
```
error TS2367: This comparison appears to be unintentional because the types 'MessageSubType.Group' and '"normal"' have no overlap.
```

Modified `packages/onebot/src/event/message.ts` to add proper type support for the non-standard `sub_type === 'normal'` case:

1. Added `Normal = 'normal'` to the `MessageSubType` enum with a comment indicating it's non-standard
2. Updated `MessagePrivateEvent` interface to include `MessageSubType.Normal` in the allowed `sub_type` union

This allows the runtime check in `packages/core/src/adapter/onebot/create/message.ts` to pass TypeScript's type checking while maintaining type safety.

When a private message with `sub_type === 'normal'` is received:
- **Before**: Event would be logged as `收到未知的私聊事件` (received unknown private chat event)
- **After**: Event is now redirected and processed as a friend message via `createFriendMessage()`

## Impact

This is a minimal change that fixes both the runtime behavior and the TypeScript compilation issue, improving overall adapter compatibility with non-standard OneBot implementations.

title: Fix: Display description text for checkbox component options
body:
## 修复 Checkbox 组件描述显示问题 / Fix Checkbox Description Display ### 问题描述 / Problem Description checkbox 复选框组件的配置中有 `description` 接口，但页面上并没有显示，不像 radio 单选框那样显示描述在选项下方。 The checkbox component has a `description` property in its configuration, but it doesn't display on the page, unlike the radio component which shows descriptions below each option. ### 根本原因 / Root Cause HeroUI Checkbox 组件 v2.3.15 不像 Radio 组件那样原生支持 `description` 属性： - `useRadio` hook 返回值包含 `description` 和 `getDescriptionProps` - `useCheckbox` hook 返回值不包含这些属性 HeroUI Checkbox v2.3.15 doesn't natively support the `description` prop like Radio does: - `useRadio` hook returns `description` and `getDescriptionProps` - `useCheckbox` hook does not include these properties ### 解决方案 / Solution 在 `packages/web/src/components/heroui/checkboxs.tsx` 中手动渲染描述文本： Modified `packages/web/src/components/heroui/checkboxs.tsx` to manually render descriptions: 1. **提取 description 属性** / Extract description from props 2. **使用 flex-col 布局包裹 checkbox** / Wrap checkbox in flex-col container 3. **条件渲染描述文本** / Conditionally render description text - 样式 / Styling: `text-xs text-default-400 ml-7 mt-0.5` - 左边距对齐标签 / Left margin aligns with label - 与其他组件样式一致 / Consistent with other components ### 视觉效果对比 / Visual Comparison ![Checkbox 描述显示对比](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d98322b2-25e5-40e8-8f74-d1796683cd71) **修复前 / Before**: checkbox 选项没有显示描述文本 **修复后 / After**: checkbox 选项下方正确显示描述文本（如 "仅解析视频时有效"） ### 修改内容 / Changes Made - [x] 分析问题并找到根本原因 / Analyzed issue and identified root cause - [x] 实现最小化修改方案 / Implemented minimal fix - [x] 保持与现有代码风格一致 / Maintained code consistency - [x] 创建视觉测试验证修复 / Created visual test to verify fix - [x] 更新 core package.json 时间戳以支持发包 / Updated core package.json timestamp for publishing **文件 / Files**: - `packages/web/src/components/heroui/checkboxs.tsx` (+22, -14 lines) - `packages/core/package.json` (timestamp update) ### 兼容性 / Compatibility ✅ 不破坏现有功能 / No breaking changes ✅ TypeScript 类型已支持（继承自 ComponentProps）/ TypeScript types already supported ✅ 向后兼容（description 为可选属性）/ Backward compatible (description is optional)

title: refactor: use ID generator API for unique incremental IDs in input adapter
body:
## Issue
Fixes the input adapter outputting duplicate URL paths when processing image files. Multiple images were receiving the same URL (e.g., `http://127.0.0.1:7777/api/v1/console/2.png`) instead of unique, sequential URLs.

## Root Cause
The adapter was using a single `index` variable for two different purposes:
- Generating message IDs in `sendMsg()` method
- Generating file names in `getUrl()` method

This coupling created unwanted dependencies between message identification and file naming logic.

## Solution
Created a reusable `createIdGenerator()` API and refactored the input adapter to use it:

### 1. New ID Generator API (`packages/core/src/utils/common/number.ts`)
```typescript
/**
 * 创建一个自增ID生成器
 * @description 返回一个函数，每次调用时返回一个递增的唯一ID
 * @param start 起始值，默认为 0
 * @returns 返回一个函数，调用时返回下一个ID
 */
export const createIdGenerator = (start: number = 0) => {
  let id = start
  return () => ++id
}
```

### 2. Refactored Input Adapter
```typescript
// Before
let index = 0
let fileIndex = 0
const messageId = (++index).toString()
const name = (++fileIndex).toString()

// After
import { createIdGenerator } from '@/utils/common'
const getMessageId = createIdGenerator()
const getFileId = createIdGenerator()
const messageId = getMessageId().toString()
const name = getFileId().toString()
```

## Benefits
- **Better Encapsulation**: Counter logic is now encapsulated in a reusable utility function
- **Improved Testability**: ID generators can be easily mocked and each instance is independent
- **Reusability**: The `createIdGenerator()` API can be used throughout the codebase
- **More Maintainable**: Clear function names describe intent, eliminating manual increment operations
- **Type Safety**: Better type inference and explicit function signatures
- **Independent Counters**: Message IDs and file names have separate, independent counters

## Example
```typescript
// Usage in other modules
const getId = createIdGenerator()
getId() // 1
getId() // 2
getId() // 3

const getIdFrom100 = createIdGenerator(100)
getIdFrom100() // 101
getIdFrom100() // 102
```

Each file now receives a unique URL path with a monotonically increasing file index.

> [!WARNING]
>
> 

Fixes KarinJS/Karin#548

title: fix: correct Redis mock SET method options handling and type checking
body:
- [x] Analyze PR #543 description and code changes
- [x] Review and verify all 18 new Redis mock methods are implemented correctly  
- [x] Fix all critical bugs in SET method
- [x] Verify key renaming and expiration handling work correctly
- [x] Verify random key and database statistics methods
- [x] Verify all expire methods work on all key types
- [x] Verify all string and numeric operations
- [x] Verify multi-key operations
- [x] Fix setNX return type to match official Redis API
- [x] Fix shadowed variable in NX option

## ✅ Latest Updates

### Fixed setNX Return Type
Changed the return type of `setNX` from `Promise<boolean>` to `Promise<number>` to match the official Redis API:
- Returns `1` if the key was set successfully
- Returns `0` if the key already exists and was not set

### Fixed Shadowed Variable in NX Option
Removed the `const expire = -1` declaration in the NX option handler that was shadowing the outer scope's `expire` variable. Now directly uses the literal value `-1` in the SQLite call.

The PXAT option handling is correct - it's part of an if-else chain, so setting `this.#str[key] = value` after handling PXAT metadata is appropriate and doesn't conflict with KEEPTTL, NX, XX, or GET options which are in separate branches.

  async rename (key: string, newKey: string): Promise<string> {
    if (!this.store[key]) throw new Error('no such key')

    // 获取原键的数据
    const { type, expire } = this.store[key]
    const value = this.getValueStringByKey(key)

    // 删除旧键
    this.#del(key)

    // 创建新键
    this.store[newKey] = { type, expire }

    // 根据类型设置值
    switch (type) {
      case Key.STR:
        this.#str[newKey] = value
        break
      case Key.NUM:
        this.#num[newKey] = Number(value)
        break
      case Key.HASH:
        this.#hash[newKey] = JSON.parse(value)
        break
      case Key.LIST:
        this.#list[newKey] = JSON.parse(value)
        break
      case Key.SET:
        this.#set[newKey] = new Set(JSON.parse(value))
        break
      case Key.ZSET:
        this.#zset[newKey] = JSON.parse(value)
        break
      case Key.PF:
        this.#pf[newKey] = new Set(JSON.parse(value))
        break
      case Key.BIT:
        this.#bit[newKey] = Buffer.from(value, 'base64')
        break
    }

    this.#sqlite.set(newKey, value, type, expire)
    return 'OK'

When newKey already exists, Redis RENAME overwrites the destination, but this implementation does not remove existing type-specific data for newKey before assignment, potentially leaving orphaned data (e.g., stale this.#hash[newKey]). Add a pre-step to delete newKey (if different from key) via this.#del(newKey) to avoid inconsistent internal state, and optionally guard key === newKey to mimic Redis error semantics.

title: fix: 修复 Redis Mock 客户端缺少 setEx 等常用方法的问题
body:
## 问题描述

使用模拟的 Redis 客户端时遇到错误：`TypeError: redis.setEx is not a function`

这是因为 mock Redis 客户端实现不完整，缺少 `setEx` 及其他常用的 Redis 命令。

## 解决方案

本 PR 为 mock Redis 客户端补充了 18 个常用的 Redis 方法，使其更接近真实 Redis 客户端的 API。

### 主要新增方法

**字符串操作与过期时间设置：**
- `setEx(key, seconds, value)` - 设置键值对并指定过期时间（秒）**[修复原问题]**
- `pSetEx(key, milliseconds, value)` - 设置键值对并指定过期时间（毫秒）
- `setNX(key, value)` - 仅当键不存在时设置
- `getEx(key, options)` - 获取值并可选更新过期时间
- `getDel(key)` - 原子性地获取并删除键
- `strLen(key)` - 获取字符串长度

**数值操作：**
- `incrBy(key, increment)` - 按指定值自增
- `decrBy(key, decrement)` - 按指定值自减
- `incrByFloat(key, increment)` - 按浮点数自增

**过期时间管理：**
- `expireAt(key, timestamp)` - 设置到期时间戳（秒）
- `pExpire(key, milliseconds)` - 设置过期时间（毫秒）
- `pExpireAt(key, timestamp)` - 设置到期时间戳（毫秒）
- `pTTL(key)` - 获取剩余生存时间（毫秒）
- `persist(key)` - 移除键的过期时间

**键管理工具：**
- `rename(key, newKey)` - 重命名键
- `renameNX(key, newKey)` - 仅当新键不存在时重命名
- `dbSize()` - 返回数据库中键的数量
- `randomKey()` - 随机返回一个键

### Bug 修复

修复了以下三个方法的错误实现，它们之前被错误地实现为仅支持 HyperLogLog 类型：
- `pExpire` - 现在支持所有键类型
- `pTTL` - 现在支持所有键类型
- `pExpireAt` - 现在支持所有键类型

## 技术细节

所有新增方法：
- ✅ 遵循 Redis 标准 API 规范
- ✅ 支持键过期检查
- ✅ 集成 SQLite 持久化
- ✅ 包含完整的中文文档注释
- ✅ 与真实 Redis 客户端兼容

## 测试验证

已验证：
- 18/18 方法正确实现
- 无重复方法定义
- 方法签名符合 Redis 标准

## 影响范围

此更改仅影响 mock Redis 客户端 (`packages/core/src/core/db/redis/mock/index.ts`)，不影响真实 Redis 连接的行为。现有代码完全向后兼容。

title: Fix console adapter to use correct file extensions for video and audio files
body:
## Problem The console adapter was incorrectly using `.png` as the file extension for all media types (images, videos, and audio files). This caused video and audio files to be saved with the wrong extension, resulting in incorrect URLs being displayed in the console. As shown in the issue screenshot, when sending a video message, the console would display a URL with `.png` extension even though the file was a video, and the actual video URL would show URL-encoded Chinese characters indicating the wrong file type. ## Solution Modified the `sendMsg` method in the console adapter to dynamically determine the correct file extension based on the media element type: - **Images**: `.png` extension (unchanged) - **Videos**: `.mp4` extension (fixed) - **Audio/Record files**: `.mp3` extension (fixed) **Before:** ```typescript if (v.type === 'image' || v.type === 'record' || v.type === 'video') { const url = v.file.startsWith('http') ? v.file : await this.getUrl(v.file, '.png') msg.push(`[${v.type}: ${logger.blue(url)} ]`) continue } ``` **After:** ```typescript if (v.type === 'image' || v.type === 'record' || v.type === 'video') { let ext = '.png' if (v.type === 'video') ext = '.mp4' if (v.type === 'record') ext = '.mp3' const url = v.file.startsWith('http') ? v.file : await this.getUrl(v.file, ext) msg.push(`[${v.type}: ${logger.blue(url)} ]`) continue } ``` ## Impact This fix ensures that: 1. Video files are saved and displayed with `.mp4` extension 2. Audio/record files are saved and displayed with `.mp3` extension 3. The server can correctly identify and serve files with the appropriate `Content-Type` header (as defined in the console router's `ALLOWED_TYPES` mapping) 4. URLs displayed in the console accurately reflect the actual file type Fixes #49

title: Fix: Support Array<string | Elements> in active message interface
body:
## Problem

The active message interface (`sendMsg`, `sendMaster`, `sendAdmin`) did not support arrays containing mixed strings and message segments. This prevented users from sending messages like:

```typescript
const message = [
  'Hello ',
  segment.at('123456'),
  ', check out this image: ',
  segment.image('image.jpg'),
  ' Amazing!'
]
await karin.sendMsg(selfId, contact, message) // Type error!
```

## Root Cause

Two files had incorrect local `Message` type definitions that only allowed `Array<Elements>`:

```typescript
type Message = string | Elements | Array<Elements> // ❌ Incorrect
```

While the correct `SendMessage` type was already properly defined in the type system as:

```typescript
export type SendMessage = string | Elements | Array<string | Elements> // ✅ Correct
```

The local definitions were shadowing the correct type and preventing mixed arrays.

## Changes

This PR fixes the issue by removing the incorrect local `Message` type definitions and using the proper `SendMessage` type:

**Files changed:**
- `packages/core/src/service/bot.ts` - Updated `sendMsg` function to use `SendMessage` type
- `packages/core/src/core/karin/sendMsg.ts` - Updated `sendMaster` and `sendAdmin` functions to use `SendMessage` type

## Impact

After this fix, all active message functions now correctly support mixed arrays:

```typescript
// All of these patterns now work correctly:
await karin.sendMsg(selfId, contact, 'Simple string')
await karin.sendMsg(selfId, contact, segment.image('img.jpg'))
await karin.sendMsg(selfId, contact, [segment.at('123'), segment.text('Hi')])
await karin.sendMsg(selfId, contact, ['String', segment.image('img.jpg')]) // ✅ Now works!

// Also applies to:
await karin.sendMaster(selfId, masterId, ['Text', segment.at('123')])
await karin.sendAdmin(selfId, adminId, ['Text', segment.image('img.jpg')])
```

## Testing

- ✅ TypeScript compilation verified
- ✅ No breaking changes to existing code
- ✅ All existing message patterns continue to work
- ✅ New mixed array pattern now supported

title: feat: add avatar field to GroupInfo interface
body:
## Problem Previously, developers needed to make two separate API calls to get both group information and the group avatar URL: ```typescript const bot = getBot(group.botId)! const groupInfo = await bot.getGroupInfo(group.id) // First call const groupAvatarUrl = await bot.getGroupAvatarUrl(group.id) // Second call ``` This resulted in unnecessary code duplication and extra async operations. ## Solution Added an optional `avatar` field to the `GroupInfo` interface that automatically includes the group avatar URL when retrieving group information: ```typescript const bot = getBot(group.botId)! const groupInfo = await bot.getGroupInfo(group.id) // groupInfo.avatar now contains the avatar URL - no second call needed! ``` ## Changes ### 1. Updated `GroupInfo` Interface Added optional `avatar?: string` field to `packages/core/src/types/adapter/apiResponse.ts`: ```typescript export interface GroupInfo { groupId: string groupName?: string // ... other fields ... avatar?: string // NEW: Group avatar URL } ``` ### 2. Updated `getGroupInfo` Method Modified `packages/core/src/adapter/onebot/core/core.ts` to automatically fetch and include the avatar URL: ```typescript async getGroupInfo(groupId: string, noCache?: boolean) { const info = await this._onebot.getGroupInfo(Number(groupId), noCache) const avatar = await this.getGroupAvatarUrl(groupId) // Fetch avatar URL return { // ... other fields ... avatar, // Include in response } } ``` ### 3. Updated `getGroupList` Method Also updated `getGroupList` to include avatar URLs for consistency across the API. ## Benefits - ✅ **Reduced API calls**: Single call instead of two separate async operations - ✅ **Better DX**: More intuitive and convenient API - ✅ **Backward compatible**: The field is optional, existing code continues to work - ✅ **Consistent**: Both `getGroupInfo` and `getGroupList` now include avatar information Closes #[issue_number] > [!WARNING] > >

title: Fix: Change faceId type from number to number | string in setMsgReaction
body:
## Description

Fixed the `faceId` parameter type in `bot.setMsgReaction` to accept both `number` and `string` types, resolving a type incompatibility issue between the adapter base class and specific adapter implementations.

## Problem

The `setMsgReaction` method was defined with `faceId` as `number` only, but adapter implementations (like Lagrange.OneBot and NapCat.Onebot) require string types for their underlying APIs. This created a type mismatch where:

- Other adapters have `faceId` as string-only type
- The base class type signature was too restrictive
- The actual implementation was already converting numbers to strings (`faceId + ''`)

## Solution

Updated the type signature across all adapter classes to accept `faceId: number | string`:

1. **Interface definition** (`packages/core/src/types/adapter/class.ts`) - Updated the `AdapterType` interface
2. **Base adapter** (`packages/core/src/adapter/base/index.ts`) - Updated the abstract base implementation
3. **OneBot adapter** (`packages/core/src/adapter/onebot/core/core.ts`) - Updated the concrete implementation
4. **Console adapter** (`packages/core/src/adapter/input/index.ts`) - Updated the console implementation

This change is backward compatible since it expands the accepted types rather than restricting them, and the existing string conversion logic (`faceId + ''`) already handles both number and string inputs correctly.

## Testing

Verified that the type change is valid TypeScript and that the existing implementation logic (which converts to string) works correctly with both input types.

Fixes issue where `faceId` type was incompatible with adapter base class requirements.

title: fix: 修改文档路径
body:
## Sourcery 摘要

更新 Web 面板和项目脚手架脚本中的文档 URL，使其指向新的 karinjs.com 域名。

Bug 修复：
- 在 AboutUs 组件中，将所有指向 docs.karin.fun 的 href 替换为指向 karinjs.com 的链接
- 将更新日志链接从 docs.karin.fun/other/changelog 更新为 karinjs.com/changelog/
- 修正 create-karin 中的 CLI 输出，使其引用 https://karinjs.com 上的文档，而不是 https://karin.fun

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Update documentation URLs to the new karinjs.com domain across the web dashboard and project scaffolding scripts.

Bug Fixes:
- Replace all hrefs pointing to docs.karin.fun with links to karinjs.com in the AboutUs component
- Update the changelog link from docs.karin.fun/other/changelog to karinjs.com/changelog/
- Correct the CLI output in create-karin to reference docs at https://karinjs.com instead of https://karin.fun

</details>

body:
Bumps [axios](https://github.com/axios/axios) from 1.8.2 to 1.12.0.
Release notes

Sourced from axios's releases.

Release v1.12.0

Release notes:

Bug Fixes

  • adding build artifacts (9ec86de)
  • dont add dist on release (a2edc36)
  • fetch-adapter: set correct Content-Type for Node FormData (#6998) (a9f47af)
  • node: enforce maxContentLength for data: URLs (#7011) (945435f)
  • package exports (#5627) (aa78ac2)
  • params: removing '[' and ']' from URL encode exclude characters (#3316) (#5715) (6d84189)
  • release pr run (fd7f404)
  • types: change the type guard on isCancel (#5595) (0dbb7fd)

Features

  • adapter: surface low‑level network error details; attach original error via cause (#6982) (78b290c)
  • fetch: add fetch, Request, Response env config variables for the adapter; (#7003) (c959ff2)
  • support reviver on JSON.parse (#5926) (2a97634), closes #5924
  • types: extend AxiosResponse interface to include custom headers type (#6782) (7960d34)

title: Bug: 生产环境的 process.env.NODE_ENV 是 'development'
body: ### 描述问题 ### 复现步骤 1. karin app ### 预期行为 process.env.NODE_ENV = production ### 实际行为 process.env.NODE_ENV = development ### 操作系统 win11 ### Node.js 版本 any ### 项目版本 1.10.20 ### 附加信息 .env: ```env # 是否启用HTTP HTTP_ENABLE=true # HTTP监听端口 HTTP_PORT=7777 # HTTP监听地址 HTTP_HOST=0.0.0.0 # HTTP鉴权秘钥 仅用于karin自身Api HTTP_AUTH_KEY=z92X2M # ws_server鉴权秘钥 WS_SERVER_AUTH_KEY=xC4bxR # 是否启用Redis 关闭后将使用内部虚拟Redis REDIS_ENABLE=true # 重启是否调用pm2 如果不调用则会直接关机 此配置适合有进程守护的程序 PM2_RESTART=true # 日志等级 LOG_LEVEL=info # 日志保留天数 LOG_DAYS_TO_KEEP=7 # 日志文件最大大小 如果此项大于0则启用日志分割 LOG_MAX_LOG_SIZE=0 # logger.fnc颜色 LOG_FNC_COLOR="#E1D919" # 日志实时Api最多支持同时连接数 LOG_API_MAX_CONNECTIONS=5 # ffmpeg FFMPEG_PATH= # ffprobe FFPROBE_PATH= # ffplay FFPLAY_PATH= RUNTIME=node NODE_ENV=production TSX_WATCH=false 日志实时Api最多支持同时连接数 LOG_MAX_CONNECTIONS=5 ```

title: refactor: plugins
body:
## Sourcery 总结

全面改进了核心插件框架，通过引入集中式插件管理器和注册模块，将插件 API（命令、接受、按钮、任务、处理程序和类样式）统一为带有控制接口的详细缓存对象，并将常见的事件处理、过滤、冷却、权限和分发逻辑提取到可重用工具中。添加了热重载支持和用于动态文件 globbing 的新 `@karin/glob` 包。更新了服务器插件端点，整合了遗留代码，现代化了 Vite 构建配置，并提升了项目依赖。

新特性：
- 添加了 `@karin/glob` 包，包含 `importGlob` 和 `importGlobEager`，用于动态文件加载和原始内容支持
- 为基于命令、接受、按钮、任务、处理程序和类的插件实现了集中式插件管理器和注册模块
- 通过 `core/karin/class.ts` 引入了基于类的插件支持
- 在 `event/utils` 下添加了统一的事件工具（`filter`、`cooldown`、`checker`、`permission`、`initializer`、`dispatch` 和 `logger`）
- 添加了热重载函数 `reloadApp` 和 `reloadPackage`，用于实时插件更新

改进：
- 重构了所有消息、通知和请求处理程序，以使用共享的 `handleMessageCommon` 和 `dispatch` 工具
- 重新设计了核心 Karin API，以返回带有流畅控制接口的丰富插件缓存对象
- 更新了服务器插件端点和类型，以与新的插件缓存和管理器集成
- 通过将 `manualChunks` 迁移到 `advancedChunks` 并调整压缩和命名设置来简化 Vite 构建配置
- 删除了遗留的内联处理程序逻辑，并整合到新的工具驱动结构中

构建：
- 更新了 `devDependencies` 版本并添加了缺少的依赖项，如 `glob`

文档：
- 为 `@karin/glob` 包添加了 `README.md` 文档

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Overhaul the core plugin framework by introducing a centralized plugin manager and register modules, unifying plugin APIs (command, accept, button, task, handler, and class styles) into detailed cache objects with control interfaces, and extracting common event handling, filtering, cooldown, permission, and dispatch logic into reusable utilities. Add hot-reload support and a new @karin/glob package for dynamic file globbing. Update server plugin endpoints, consolidate legacy code, modernize Vite build configuration, and bump project dependencies.

New Features:
- Add @karin/glob package with importGlob and importGlobEager for dynamic file loading and raw content support
- Implement centralized plugin manager and register modules for command, accept, button, task, handler, and class-based plugins
- Introduce class-based plugin support via core/karin/class.ts
- Add unified event utilities (filter, cooldown, checker, permission, initializer, dispatch, and logger) under event/utils
- Add hot-reload functions reloadApp and reloadPackage for live plugin updates

Enhancements:
- Refactor all message, notice, and request handlers to use shared handleMessageCommon and dispatch utilities
- Redesign core Karin APIs to return rich plugin cache objects with fluent control interfaces
- Update server plugin endpoints and types to integrate with the new plugin cache and manager
- Simplify Vite build configuration by migrating manualChunks to advancedChunks and adjusting compression and naming settings
- Remove legacy inline handler logic and consolidate into the new utility-driven structure

Build:
- Update devDependencies versions and add missing dependencies like glob

Documentation:
- Add README.md documentation for @karin/glob package

</details>

title: Fix: 修复lagrange环境下 调用getHistoryMsg只使用getGroupMsgHistory的问题
body:
只要使用的是 Lagrange.OneBot，并且 startMsgId 是 string 类型，它就会调用 lgl_getGroupMsgHistory

这个逻辑没有判断 contact.scene 是 'group' 还是 'friend'，这就是问题来源

好的，这是翻译成中文的 pull request 总结：

## Sourcery 总结

为 Lagrange.OneBot 的 getHistoryMsg 方法添加场景感知处理，通过基于 contact.scene 调用适当的 API，并为不支持的场景抛出错误。

Bug 修复：
- 修复 Lagrange.OneBot 中的 getHistoryMsg，对群聊使用 `lgl_getGroupMsgHistory`，对好友聊天使用 `lgl_getFriendMsgHistory`
- 当 Lagrange.OneBot 的 getHistoryMsg 中 `contact.scene` 不是 'group' 或 'friend' 时抛出错误

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Add scene-aware handling to the getHistoryMsg method for Lagrange.OneBot by calling the appropriate API based on contact.scene and throwing an error for unsupported scenes

Bug Fixes:
- Fix getHistoryMsg in Lagrange.OneBot to use lgl_getGroupMsgHistory for group chats and lgl_getFriendMsgHistory for friend chats
- Throw an error when contact.scene is not 'group' or 'friend' in Lagrange.OneBot getHistoryMsg

</details>

## Sourcery 总结

将动态插件加载集成到侧边栏，添加带有 Toast 通知的刷新按钮，重构侧边栏菜单逻辑以实现更简洁的展开处理，迁移到 Material Symbols 作为图标，并扩展核心插件类型和 Web 配置默认值以包含图标元数据。

新功能：
- 在侧边栏中添加插件列表刷新按钮，并带有成功/错误 Toast 通知
- 动态加载和显示已安装的插件，并在“插件管理”侧边栏部分下按配置可用性排序
- 迁移图标组件以使用 Material Symbols Outlined 字体

增强功能：
- 通过删除嵌套的子菜单状态并统一插件路由的路径匹配，简化侧边栏菜单展开逻辑
- 引入 `loadPlugins` 辅助函数来处理插件初始化，包括加载指示器和错误处理
- 更新 `siteConfig` 初始化，以通过前端 API 请求获取插件数据并相应地填充导航项

文档：
- 更新 `icon.css` 以支持 Material Symbols Outlined 字体和 CSS 类

<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Integrate dynamic plugin loading into the sidebar, add a refresh button with toast notifications, refactor sidebar menu logic for cleaner expansion handling, migrate to Material Symbols for icons, and extend core plugin types and web config defaults to include icon metadata.

New Features:
- Add in-sidebar plugin list refresh button with success/error toasts
- Dynamically load and display installed plugins under the "插件管理" sidebar section, sorted by configuration availability
- Migrate icon component to use Material Symbols Outlined font

Enhancements:
- Simplify sidebar menu expansion logic by removing nested submenu state and unifying path matching for plugin routes
- Introduce a loadPlugins helper to handle plugin initialization with loading indicators and error handling
- Update siteConfig initialization to fetch plugin data via a frontend API request and populate nav items accordingly

Documentation:
- Update icon.css to support Material Symbols Outlined font-face and CSS classes

</details>

好的，这是将拉取请求摘要翻译成中文的结果：

## Sourcery 总结

通过定义核心类型和 API，暴露组件，并在 web 包中集成渲染和配置处理，从而端到端地添加对下拉列表（select）组件的支持。

新功能：
- 在 core 包中定义 `SelectOption` 和 `SelectProps` 类型，并提供 `select.create/default` API
- 在核心组件导出中公开并注册 select 组件
- 在 web 包中使用 React Hook Form 和 HeroUI 实现 `createSelect` 辅助函数，用于渲染下拉列表
- 扩展插件配置以处理 'select' `componentType`，包括初始值、默认处理和结果转换

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Add support for dropdown (select) components end-to-end by defining core types and APIs, exposing the component, and integrating rendering and configuration handling in the web package.

New Features:
- Define SelectOption and SelectProps types and provide select.create/default APIs in the core package
- Expose and register the select component in the core components export
- Implement createSelect helper in the web package with React Hook Form and HeroUI for rendering dropdowns

title: refactor: onebot
body:
好的，这是翻译成中文的 pull request 总结：

## Sourcery 总结

重构 OneBot 适配器，利用新的 `@karinjs/onebot` 核心库来处理 WebSocket 和 HTTP 连接，从而简化 API 调用、事件处理和分段转换。

新特性：
- 添加 `OneBotWsManager` 和 `OneBotHttpManager` 来管理 WebSocket 和 HTTP 客户端
- 引入 `createOneBotWsServer`、`createOneBotClient`、`createOneBotHttp` 和 `disconnectAllOneBotServer` 辅助函数

增强：
- 迁移 `AdapterOneBot` 以将 API 调用和事件委托给 `OneBotWs`/`OneBotHttp` 实例
- 使用 `EventKeys` 统一事件分发，并移除手动 `post_type` 分支
- 使用 `OneBotSegmentType` 简化分段转换，并更新转换程序
- 移除已弃用的 OneBot11 特有方法和自定义 HTTP 客户端实现

构建：
- 更新 `pnpm-lock.yaml` 以包含对 `@karinjs/onebot` 的工作区依赖

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Refactor the OneBot adapter to leverage the new `@karinjs/onebot` core library for both WebSocket and HTTP connections, simplifying API calls, event handling, and segment conversion.

New Features:
- Add `OneBotWsManager` and `OneBotHttpManager` to manage WebSocket and HTTP clients
- Introduce `createOneBotWsServer`, `createOneBotClient`, `createOneBotHttp`, and `disconnectAllOneBotServer` helpers

Enhancements:
- Migrate `AdapterOneBot` to delegate API calls and events to `OneBotWs`/`OneBotHttp` instances
- Unify event dispatch using `EventKeys` and remove manual post_type branching
- Streamline segment conversion with `OneBotSegmentType` and update conversion routines
- Remove deprecated OneBot11-specific methods and custom HTTP client implementations

Build:
- Update `pnpm-lock.yaml` to include workspace dependency on `@karinjs/onebot`

</details>

## Sourcery 总结

重构插件索引页面，引入统一的仪表盘，改进服务器和客户端逻辑，并添加缓存和可重用的 UI 组件。

- 集成和重构 npm 注册表实用程序（`getNpmRegistry`、`getNpmLatestVersion`）并扩展相关的类型定义
- 在插件响应中将 `latestHash` 替换为 `latestVersion`，并嵌入 `webConfig` 元数据

- Integrate and refactor npm registry utilities (`getNpmRegistry`, `getNpmLatestVersion`) and extend related type definitions
- Replace `latestHash` with `latestVersion` in plugin responses and embed `webConfig` metadata
- Simplify frontend requests by removing deprecated merge logic and redundant titles in filter cards

- Update site navigation to route plugin management through the new dashboard and remove old sidebar menus

- 添加详细内存使用情况、系统路径和网络接口等扩展信息

title: fix: 修复并重构更新日志展示功能，提取为独立组件 UpdateLogModal
body:
好的，这是翻译成简体中文的 pull request 总结：

## Sourcery 总结

提取并重构更新日志显示和更新控制到专用组件中，简化仪表板中的版本处理，并通过一致的样式增强 Markdown 渲染。

增强功能：
- 将更新日志的获取和展示提取到独立的 `UpdateLogModal` 组件中。
- 将更新确认和重启逻辑移动到可重用的 `UpdateButtons` 组件中。
- 重构“状态”页面以使用新组件，并删除内联模态框和版本获取代码。
- 添加 `getPackageType` 并改进 `extractUpdateLogs` 以过滤和排序跨多个包类型的发布日志。
- 扩展 `Markdown` 组件以接受 `className` 并支持其他元素（`pre`、`li`、`strong`、`em`），并统一样式。
- 调整 `npmLatest` 的状态类型，并删除状态检查中不必要的轮询间隔。

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Extract and refactor update log display and update controls into dedicated components, simplify version handling in the dashboard, and enhance markdown rendering with consistent styling.

Enhancements:
- Extract update log fetching and presentation into a standalone UpdateLogModal component.
- Move update confirmation and restart logic into a reusable UpdateButtons component.
- Refactor the Status page to use the new components and remove inline modal and version-fetching code.
- Add getPackageType and improve extractUpdateLogs to filter and sort release logs across multiple package types.
- Extend Markdown component to accept className and support additional elements (pre, li, strong, em) with unified styling.
- Adjust state typings for npmLatest and remove unnecessary polling intervals in status checks.

</details>

title: Bug: 前台启动无法通过父进程通知子进程重启
body:
### 描述问题

前台启动无法通过父进程通知子进程重启



### 复现步骤

## 请求接口
url: `api/v1/restart`
body: `{"isPm2":false,"reloadDeps":false}`

### 预期行为

子进程重启

### 实际行为

```
[Karin][14:38:13.192][MARK] 收到重启请求，正在重启...
[Karin][14:38:13.194][INFO] [ProcessManager] 收到消息 | 类型: restart | 重载依赖: 否
[Karin][14:38:13.194][INFO] [ProcessManager] 准备重启子进程 | 当前PID: 22940 | 重载依赖: 否 | 重启次数: 1
[Karin][14:38:13.194][INFO] [ProcessManager] 发送终止信号 | PID: 22940 | 信号: SIGTERM
[Karin][14:38:13.195][INFO] [ProcessManager] 等待进程终止 | PID: 22940 | 超时: 200ms
[Karin][14:38:13.218][INFO] [ProcessManager] 端口 7777 已释放，可以使用
[Karin][14:38:13.218][INFO] [ProcessManager] 确保进程终止 | PID: 22940 | 发送强制终止信号
[Karin][14:38:13.296][INFO] [ProcessManager] 启动子进程 | PID: 29268 | 入口: app.mjs | 参数: 无
[Karin][14:38:13.297][INFO] [ProcessManager] 重启完成 | 旧PID: 22940 | 新PID: 29268 | 耗时: 103ms
[Karin][14:38:13.298][INFO] [ProcessManager] 子进程退出 | 信号: SIGTERM | 运行时间: 0.1s
[Karin][14:38:13.298][INFO] [ProcessManager] 正在关闭子进程 | PID: 29268 | 运行时间: 0.1s
[Karin][14:38:13.298][INFO] [ProcessManager] 发送终止信号 | PID: 29268 | 信号: SIGTERM
[Karin][14:38:13.299][INFO] [ProcessManager] 等待进程终止 | PID: 29268 | 超时: 200ms
[Karin][14:38:13.300][INFO] [ProcessManager] 父进程退出 | 总运行时间: 1.6m | 重启次数: 1
[Karin][14:38:13.301][INFO] [ProcessManager] 父进程退出 | 总运行时间: 1.6m | 重启次数: 1
```

### 操作系统

win11

### Node.js 版本

21.7.3

### 项目版本

1.10.4

### 附加信息

处于生产环境。运行时处于 `node` 时问题同上。只有使用 `npx karin pm2` 进行后台启动的时候请求以上接口才会重启成功

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/cb4014b9-61e8-4019-8305-805b69d6c1c0)

问：
1. 使用pm2进行进程管理的时候是否能触发在后台父进程通知子进程重启，而不是通过pm2管理父进程实现子进程重启。

style: 更真实的玻璃质感、重构插件配置页布局
body:
好的，这是翻译成中文的 pull request 总结：

## Sourcery 总结

在仪表盘中引入一种新的玻璃拟物化主题，重构关键布局以获得更好的用户体验，并简化对话框流程。

新功能：
- 添加一个可点击的插件卡片，打开一个详细的玻璃风格模态框，其中包含版本、类型、作者和描述信息。

增强功能：
- 使用响应式玻璃效果卡片、独立的操作面板和粘性标题布局改造插件配置页面。
- 将新的玻璃效果 Tailwind 插件实用程序应用于按钮、卡片、状态项和模态框，以实现一致的半透明样式。
- 通过 useDialog hook 将侧边栏的注销模态框替换为简化的确认对话框，并将注销逻辑迁移到专用 helper 中。
- 从仪表盘中删除旧的 OnlineStatus 组件以简化状态显示。

构建：
- 在 tailwind.config.js 中添加自定义玻璃效果实用程序，用于玻璃拟物化样式。

杂项：
- 在配置适配器和系统配置组件中应用尾随逗号和格式修复。
- 升级 react-aria utils 并确保 pnpm lockfile 中的 react-dom 对等依赖项。

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Introduce a new glass-morphism theme across the dashboard, refactor key layouts for better UX, and streamline dialog flows.

New Features:
- Add a clickable plugin card that opens a detailed glass-style modal with version, type, author, and description information.

Enhancements:
- Revamp the plugin configuration page with responsive glass-effect cards, separate action panel, and a sticky header layout.
- Apply a new  glass-effect Tailwind plugin utility to buttons, cards, status items, and modals for consistent translucent styling.
- Replace the Sidebar’s sign-out modal with a streamlined confirmation dialog via useDialog hook and migrate sign-out logic into a dedicated helper.
- Remove the legacy OnlineStatus component from the dashboard to simplify status display.

Build:
- Add a custom glass-effect utility within tailwind.config.js for glass-morphism styling.

Chores:
- Apply trailing comma and formatting fixes in config adapters and system config components.
- Bump react-aria utils and ensure react-dom peer dependencies in pnpm lockfile.

</details>

body:

## Sourcery 总结

新特性：
- 从 .env 读取 HTTP 端口，默认回退端口为 7777
- 添加逻辑以等待 HTTP 端口释放，然后再重启子进程

- 在 create-karin 中修剪项目名称输入中的空格

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Enhance create-karin compatibility by making HTTP port configurable and reusable, ensuring child processes free their ports before restart, supporting optional pm2 cleanup on exit, and sanitizing projectName input.

New Features:
- Read HTTP port from .env with a default fallback of 7777
- Add logic to wait for HTTP port release before restarting child processes

Bug Fixes:
- Trim whitespace from the project name input in create-karin

Enhancements:
- Always ensure port availability in terminateChildProcess
- Introduce optional pm2 process deletion in processExit and update exitRouter to trigger it

</details>

title: fix: kill Process
body:
好的，这是翻译成中文的 pull request 总结：

## Sourcery 总结

增强进程重启逻辑，通过轮询 HTTP 端口释放并在启动前强制终止残留的子进程

增强功能：
- 引入 `waitForPortRelease` 方法，通过终止卡住的进程来重复检查和释放 HTTP 端口
- 添加 `getHttpPort` 以从 `.env` 文件加载 `HTTP_PORT`，默认回退值为 7777
- 在生成新的子进程之前集成端口可用性检查，以确保干净的重启
- 使用可选链加强 `process.kill` 调用，以避免 PID 未定义时的运行时错误

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

好的，这是翻译成中文的 pull request 总结：

## Sourcery 总结

改进进程重启和退出处理，包括增加 HTTP 端口轮询、基于环境变量的端口配置以及增强的子进程终止功能（包括可选的 PM2 清理）。

新特性：
- 增加 `waitForPortRelease` 以轮询并释放 HTTP 端口，通过在重启前终止挂起的子进程来实现
- 引入 `getHttpPort` 以从 `.env` 文件加载 `HTTP_PORT`，并回退到默认端口 7777

Bug 修复：
- 确保强制终止残留的子进程，以释放被占用的端口并避免重启时的冲突

增强功能：
- 定义 `DEFAULT_HTTP_PORT` 常量，并在 `process.kill` 调用中使用可选链，以防止运行时错误
- 将端口可用性检查集成到进程重启序列中，以实现干净的重启
- 扩展 `processExit` 以接受 `isKillPm2` 标志，并在退出时删除 PM2 进程
- 更新退出路由以调用 `processExit`，并启用 PM2 清理

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Improve process restart and exit handling by adding HTTP port polling, environment-based port configuration, and enhanced child process termination including optional PM2 cleanup.

New Features:
- Add waitForPortRelease to poll and free the HTTP port by terminating hanging child processes before restart
- Introduce getHttpPort to load HTTP_PORT from a .env file with a fallback to the default port 7777

Bug Fixes:
- Ensure lingering child processes are forcibly terminated to free occupied ports and avoid conflicts on restart

Enhancements:
- Define DEFAULT_HTTP_PORT constant and use optional chaining in process.kill calls to prevent runtime errors
- Integrate port availability checks into the process restart sequence for clean restarts
- Extend processExit to accept an isKillPm2 flag and delete the PM2 process when exiting
- Update the exit router to invoke processExit with PM2 cleanup enabled

</details>

</details>

title: refactor: 自定义动态组件
body:
好的，这是翻译成中文的 pull request 摘要：

## Sourcery 总结

支持自定义动态插件组件，通过新增服务端 API、客户端加载页面、全局 React 暴露，以及一个基于 UMD 的示例演示插件。

新特性：
- 增加服务端 endpoint 以获取自定义插件组件的入口点
- 全局暴露 React 和 ReactDOM 以支持基于 UMD 的插件组件
- 引入一个 Web UI 路由和动态加载页面，以便在运行时获取和渲染插件组件
- 增加示例 'plugin-demo' 包，演示 UMD 打包的动态加载

增强：
- 使用 customComponents hook 和 route type 扩展插件配置 API
- 在 useTheme hook 中验证和规范化存储的主题值
- 移除服务端引导程序中默认的 wildcard 重定向到 /web

杂项：
- 更新 pnpm lockfile 以包含 plugin-demo 依赖项，并升级 @types/node 版本

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Support custom dynamic plugin components by adding a new server API, client loader page, global React exposure, and an example UMD-based demo plugin.

New Features:
- Add server endpoint to fetch custom plugin component entry points
- Expose React and ReactDOM globally to support UMD-based plugin components
- Introduce a web UI route and dynamic loader page to fetch and render plugin components at runtime
- Add example 'plugin-demo' package demonstrating UMD-packaged dynamic loading

Enhancements:
- Extend plugin configuration API with a customComponents hook and route type
- Validate and normalize stored theme values in useTheme hook
- Remove default wildcard redirect to /web in server bootstrap

Chores:
- Update pnpm lockfile to include plugin-demo dependencies and bump @types/node versions

</details>

title: build: 优化docker构建流程
body:
好的，这是翻译成中文的 pull request 总结：

## Sourcery 总结

通过将构建器和运行时阶段合并到单个镜像构建中来优化 Docker 构建管道，该构建安装 pnpm、Karin CLI，使用 Puppeteer 插件初始化 Karin 项目，并简化镜像；调整安装脚本以修改卷挂载和安装反馈。

**构建：**

- 将 Dockerfile 合并为单阶段构建，该构建安装 pnpm、@karinjs/cli，初始化项目，并添加 Puppeteer 插件
- 删除 Dockerfile 中多余的构建器阶段、EXPOSE 指令和 COPY-from-builder 指令

**部署：**

title: Bug: 手风琴Pro组件删除子项元素时渲染错误
body:
### 描述问题

1. 在手风琴pro组件中由上到下 **顺序删除** 手风琴子项时，已删除的手风琴子项并不会在前端移除，反而移除的是处于末尾的手风琴子项。
2. 虽然前端显示有问题，配置参数处理却没问题。
3. 由下往上删除时所有逻辑都正常

### 复现步骤

视频：

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/34bf3cc0-7fdb-4bc3-a0a6-d652c3f41acd

指哪打哪

### 实际行为

指东向西

Ubuntu24

### Node.js 版本

21

### 项目版本

1.8.8

title: 彻底适配`pnpm10`
body:
1. 不可以在`package.json`中添加`pnpm`字段，否则会与 `pnpm v9.x` 造成冲突，导致 `pnpm v9.x` 无法使用
2. 需要考虑新增1个指令 来快捷写入、删除运行执行的二进制脚本
3. docs添加引导，如果遇见了二进制脚本不处于白名单下怎么操作。

title: Bug: 插件必须重载一次才可以注册command
body:
### 描述问题

假设plugins目录下有一份插件 负责匹配/help命令 且正确导出了函数

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/47f46411-1ebe-4176-b9f7-0a53804941a9)

在首次启动的时候 不会匹配对应消息 即便logger已经输出了该模块已经被导入

必须需要hmr重载一次（手动按一次保存触发重载）才可以匹配命令

### 复现步骤

同上

### 预期行为

必须需要重载一次才会匹配

title: fix: 最小复现包ci
body:
好的，这是翻译成中文的 pull request 总结：

## Sourcery 总结

简化和精简用于包发布的 CI 工作流程，方法是移除版本修改步骤并调整 node 和 pnpm 版本。

CI：
- 将 Node.js 版本从 21 降级到 20
- 将 pnpm 版本从 9.7.1 降低到 9
- 移除自定义版本号生成脚本
- 修改包发布命令以发布所有包，而不仅仅是核心包

杂项：
- 移除与版本相关的环境变量以及工作流程摘要和注释中的引用

<details>
<summary>Original summary in English</summary>

## Summary by Sourcery

Simplify and streamline the CI workflow for package publishing by removing version modification steps and adjusting node and pnpm versions

CI:
- Downgrade Node.js version from 21 to 20
- Reduce pnpm version from 9.7.1 to 9
- Remove custom version number generation script
- Modify package publishing command to publish all packages instead of just core package

Chores:
- Remove version-related environment variable and references in workflow summary and comments

</details>

title: Bug: 手风琴Pro组件渲染数据出错
body:
### 描述问题

数据源：
```ts
const data = [
  {
    title: '数据项1',
    input: '数据项1',
    switch: true,
  },
  {
    input: '数据项2',
    switch: false,
  },
]
```
组件编写：
```ts
  components: () => [
    components.accordionPro.create(
      'accordion-pro-key',
      data,
      {
        children: components.accordion.createItem('item-key', {
          title: '子项标题',
          subtitle: '子项副标题',
          children: [
            components.input.string('input', {
              type: 'text',
            }), // 这里需要与data的key一致
            components.switch.create('switch'),
          ],
        }),
      }),
  ],
```
然而前端无法渲染对应的数据，只成功渲染了定义子组件本身的相关内容（如title）,传给子组件的默认值无法成功渲染。

### 复现步骤

如上

### 预期行为

成功渲染对应数据

### 实际行为

如图：

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2285184c-5ab1-490b-b024-a105c90e0f97)

此处的字符串输入框应该显示`数据项1`，但结果为空

### 操作系统

win11

### Node.js 版本

any

### 项目版本

1.7.9

### 附加信息

_No response_
